It then produces emotional responses through a large language model tailored to driver preferences. The framework comprises two core modules. The vision module uses YOLOv8 variants to detect nearby vehicles and identify risky behaviors such as sudden cut-ins. Key driving metrics, including relative distance, speed, and projected reach time, are extracted and normalized to produce a structured behavior log. The language module processes this log with user-defined emotional tone settings, such as neutral, humorous, and analytical, and generates verbal reactions using state-of-the-art large language models, including ChatGPT-4o, Claude 3, Gemini 2.5, and Copilot. We evaluated the proposed system using dashcam videos containing risky driving behaviors and a user study involving 108 participants. Participants selected preferred response styles, and the large language models were evaluated based on emotional alignment. All models received favorable ratings, although preferences varied across personas. Notably, the combination of YOLOv8s and ChatGPT-4o achieved the highest score of 4.29 out of 5.00. By integrating real-world perception with emotionally adaptive dialogue, KYA introduces a new paradigm for emotionally intelligent in-vehicle artificial intelligence. It offers promising directions for improving safety, trust, and emotional well-being in both conventional and autonomous vehicles.

AI.tldr: KYA是一个结合YOLOv8视觉检测和多种大语言模型的视觉-语言管道，用于实时检测危险驾驶行为并生成符合驾驶员偏好的情感化响应，其中YOLOv8s与ChatGPT-4o的组合取得了4.29/5.00的最高评分。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶视觉-语言模型在感知和推理方面取得了进展，但很少考虑情感维度或真实用户体验，缺乏能够检测危险驾驶行为并生成情感化响应以提升驾驶员意识和舒适度的系统。
AI.method: KYA框架包含两个核心模块：视觉模块使用YOLOv8变体检测附近车辆并识别急切入等危险行为，提取相对距离、速度和预计到达时间等关键驾驶指标并归一化生成结构化行为日志；语言模块根据用户定义的情感语调（中性、幽默、分析性等）通过ChatGPT-4o、Claude 3、Gemini 2.5和Copilot等大语言模型生成口头反应。
AI.result: 基于行车记录仪视频和108名参与者的用户研究表明，所有大语言模型在情感对齐方面均获得良好评分但偏好因人格类型而异，其中YOLOv8s与ChatGPT-4o的组合取得了5分制下4.29分的最高评分。
AI.conclusion: KYA通过将真实世界感知与情感自适应对话相结合，为情感智能车载AI建立了新范式，为提升传统和自动驾驶车辆的安全性、信任度和情感健康提供了有前景的方向。

title: MotionForesight: Re-purposing Video Models for Future 3D Scene-Flow Prediction
summary: Humans can infer how objects are likely to move from passive observation: a cup may be lifted, a drawer may slide, and a lid may rotate shut. Such predictions expose the physical consequences of interaction needed to act in the real world. We study how to learn this anticipation from ordinary monocular videos of human-object interaction. Given a short observed video context, MotionForesight predicts future 3D trajectories for points on the manipulated object. This casts interaction prediction as object-centered 3D motion forecasting without any assumptions on the object properties. Our key insight is that video prediction models already encode rich priors about how objects move during human interactions. We redirect these priors from pixel prediction toward future 3D scene flow. We start from a dense 3D tracker built on a pretrained video model, generate pseudo-ground-truth tracks from complete clips, and train the forecaster using only the observed frames. We replace future RGB and geometry with learned mask latents and train a lightweight adapter to turn the retrospective tracking representation into a forward predictor, while freezing the large video and tracking components. Using just 40k human videos and no auxiliary inputs such as language, MotionForesight generalizes across diverse out-of-distribution objects, environments, viewpoints, and interactions. It also outperforms substantially larger models that use over a million training videos. These results show that we can efficiently re-purpose video priors into explicit geometric forecasts for embodied intelligence. https://motionforesight.github.io/

AI.tldr: MotionForesight提出了一种从被动观察的日常单目人-物交互视频中预测物体未来3D运动轨迹的方法，通过将视频预测模型的先验知识重定向为3D场景流预测，仅需4万视频即可在分布外场景中超越使用百万级视频训练的更大模型。
AI.motivation: 人类能够通过被动观察推断物体在交互中的运动方式（如杯子被提起、抽屉滑动），但现有方法在从单目视频中预测未来3D物体运动时面临挑战，通常需要大量标注数据或辅助输入（如语言、物体属性），且泛化能力有限。
AI.method: MotionForesight基于预训练视频模型构建密集3D跟踪器，从完整视频片段生成伪真值3D轨迹，然后仅利用观测帧训练预测器。通过将未来RGB和几何信息替换为学习到的掩码潜变量，并训练轻量级适配器将回顾性跟踪表征转化为前向预测，同时冻结大型视频和跟踪组件。
AI.result: 仅使用4万个人类交互视频且无需语言等辅助输入，MotionForesight在多样化的分布外物体、环境、视角和交互场景中均展现出良好的泛化能力，并显著优于使用超过百万训练视频的更大模型。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，视频预测模型中蕴含的丰富先验可以被高效地重定向为显式的3D几何预测，为具身智能提供了一种无需大量数据或标注即可实现交互预测的有效范式。
